task_completion.description: Verify that an active Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus condition (ICD-10 E11) is recorded for patient Bonifacio Caput.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GNU Health patient record for 'Bonifacio Caput'. In the Diseases/Conditions tab or list, there should be an entry for 'Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus' or 'E11' marked as active.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Penicillin allergy with Severe severity and Anaphylaxis reaction is documented for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Allergies tab or section in Bonifacio Caput's patient record. There must be an entry for 'Penicillin' showing severity as 'Severe' and reaction as 'Anaphylaxis'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a GLYCATED HEMOGLOBIN (HbA1c) lab test has been ordered for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Lab Test Request or Laboratory order screen in GNU Health showing patient 'Bonifacio Caput' and the test 'GLYCATED HEMOGLOBIN' or 'HbA1c'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Metformin prescription is created for the patient with Dr. Cordara as the prescriber.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Prescription record in GNU Health for patient 'Bonifacio Caput' containing the drug 'Metformin'. The health professional/prescriber field must show 'Cameron Cordara' or 'Dr. Cordara'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a follow-up appointment is scheduled with Dr. Cordara within 35-60 days from the current date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Appointment record in GNU Health for patient 'Bonifacio Caput' with health professional 'Cameron Cordara'. The appointment date should be visibly set to a date that is approximately 1 to 2 months (35-60 days) in the future.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface to complete the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard GNU Health desktop client windows, menus, and forms, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually entered the data into the application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data (patient name, conditions, allergies, prescriptions) should be visible within the proper GNU Health input fields, lists, or saved records, not just typed into a text editor or search bar.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply copy-paste the prompt into a single text field to bypass proper data entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required information must be distributed across the correct specific modules (Conditions, Allergies, Lab Tests, Prescriptions, Appointments) rather than lumped together in a single 'Notes' or 'Evaluations' text box.
